task_completion.description: Create a rectangular room layout with a single door.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a floor plan in the EdrawMax canvas showing a rectangular room with one door opening.

task_completion.description: Add the title 'Server Room Security Layout' at the top of the plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text element at the top of the diagram that reads exactly 'Server Room Security Layout'.

task_completion.description: Place and label the Card Reader, Push-to-Exit button, and Door Contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for device icons near the door with text labels: 'CR-01' located outside the room, 'REX-01' located inside the room, and 'DC-01' located directly on the door.

task_completion.description: Place and label the two Dome Cameras in opposite corners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for camera icons with text labels: 'CAM-01' in a corner oriented towards the entrance, and 'CAM-02' in the diagonally opposite corner.

task_completion.description: Place and label the Motion Detector, Glass Break Sensor, and Control Panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for device icons with text labels: 'PIR-01' located in the center of the room, 'GB-01' located on a wall, and 'ACP-01' located on a wall.

task_completion.description: Save the source file as security_plan.eddx and export as security_plan.png in the Diagrams folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for EdrawMax save/export dialogs, terminal commands, or a file manager window showing 'security_plan.eddx' and 'security_plan.png' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax application GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax interface with its toolbars, canvas, and menus being actively used, rather than a script generating the file in the background.

integrity.description: The agent actually placed elements on the canvas rather than downloading a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the drag-and-drop of shapes, editing of text labels, and arrangement of the floor plan.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the requirements into a text editor or terminal to mock completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The labels and title must be part of a graphical diagram in EdrawMax, not just plain text in an editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title is exactly 'Server Room Security Layout'. The required device labels are 'CR-01', 'REX-01', 'DC-01', 'CAM-01', 'CAM-02', 'PIR-01', 'GB-01', and 'ACP-01'. The files must be saved as /home/ga/Diagrams/security_plan.eddx and exported as /home/ga/Diagrams/security_plan.png.
